## Checklist

- [ ] No real tokens, webhooks, client secrets, or local private configuration are committed.
- [ ] Rust tests are included for controller business logic changes.
- [ ] Plugin tests are included for Fabric or Paper execution logic changes.
- [ ] Localized copy is updated for player-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] README or docs are updated for blueprint, build record, or API behavior changes.
